properties.name: rs.ai.ali-api-key
properties.description: DashScope (Alibaba Cloud) API key for authentication.

properties.name: rs.ai.chat-model-name
properties.description: Model name for DashScope chat completion (e.g., qwen-max).

properties.name: rs.ai.stream-model-name
properties.description: Model name for streaming chat with DashScope.

properties.name: rs.ai.embedding-model-name
properties.description: Model name for DashScope text embedding (e.g., text-embedding-v2).
